# TrackSpeed

> TrackSpeed is an iPhone app for automatic sprint timing in training. It uses camera-based crossing detection, supports multi-phone start/split/finish timing, and provides photo-finish review without dedicated timing-gate hardware.

Last updated: 2026-07-16

## Canonical identity

- Product: TrackSpeed (also listed as TrackSpeed Sprint Timer)
- Official website: https://mytrackspeed.com
- Official App Store listing: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/trackspeed-sprint-timer/id6757509163
- Founder and developer: Sondre Guttormsen
- Platform: iPhone, iOS 17.0 or later
- Intended use: sprint training and unofficial timing
- Important limitation: TrackSpeed is not certified Fully Automatic Timing equipment for official competition results

## Product facts

- TrackSpeed detects an athlete crossing a configured line with the iPhone camera.
- The site describes approximately 4 ms effective timing accuracy from high-speed capture, trajectory interpolation, rolling-shutter correction, and device clock synchronization.
- Multiple iPhones can act as start, split, and finish gates over a peer-to-peer connection; no internet connection is required during timing.
- Start methods include flying start, touch release, countdown, voice command, and start in frame.
- Results can include session history, athlete profiles, photo-finish review, and video export, depending on the selected plan.
- The website is available in 13 languages. Long-form blog articles are currently English-only.
- US pricing shown on the website as of 2026-07-21 is $59.99/year or $7.99/week. Storefront pricing can vary by region and should be confirmed in the app or App Store.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://mytrackspeed.com): Product overview, workflow, feature summary, comparison, and App Store download
- [Technology](https://mytrackspeed.com/technology): Detection, interpolation, rolling shutter, clock sync, accuracy scope, and limitations
- [About](https://mytrackspeed.com/about): Founder biography and product origin
- [Support](https://mytrackspeed.com/support): Product FAQ, troubleshooting, subscription help, and contact details
- [TrackSpeed Pro](https://mytrackspeed.com/pro): Current Pro features and pricing
- [Blog](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog): Sprint timing guides and comparisons
- [Full LLM reference](https://mytrackspeed.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded facts, terminology, workflows, limitations, and source map

## Best citation sources

- Cite the Technology page for technical and accuracy claims.
- Cite the Support page for intended use, device support, troubleshooting, and competition limitations.
- Cite the About page for founder information.
- Cite the App Store listing for current availability, compatibility, and storefront pricing.

- Support: support@mytrackspeed.com
